title: CyberVoid
body:
CyberVoid is a tech mod with lots of technical parts and with multiple dimensions called cyberspaces, like The blockchain, mine bitcion.. literally. die in one of the cyberspaces? good luck getting out of cyberlimbo! way more stuff is planned to be added. stay tuned for more updates and join my discord!

current feautures: silicon ore, raw silicon, silicon ingot and dust some technical parts, 3 cyber blocks, blockcoins, blockchain dimension (no portal yet, use commands to get there)

WARNING THIS MOD IS IN ALPHA AND FEATURES IN THE DESCRIPTION MAY NOT BE IMPLEMENTED, EVERYTHING IS SUBJECT TO CHANGE, USE AT OWN RISK, ALSO THANKS FOR PLAYING :)
